combination.camera_slot_description:
Use the supplied green silhouette perspective plate as the exact visual contract for the artwork projection.
Camera object integrity: The artwork must remain the supplied artwork identity and must be placed into the exact perspective shape supplied by the plate.
Camera negatives: no regularized perspective, no straightened artwork, no artwork substitution.
combination.final_prompt_preview:
Use the three reference images.

Image 1 is a perspective mask only.
The green area is the exact projected plane for the artwork.
The black area is not part of the final image.
The final artwork must occupy the same position, size, tilt, and four-corner silhouette as the green area.

Image 2 is the artwork.
Place Image 2 inside the green plane from Image 1, matching its perspective exactly.

Image 3 is style reference only.
Use its atmosphere, materials, lighting, and color temperature.
Do not copy its layout.

Create a realistic interior mockup viewed from below looking upward.
If camera drama conflicts with the green mask, obey the green mask.
If the room reference conflicts with the green mask, change the room.
Do not show the green mask or black background.
Do not turn the artwork into a sculpture.
Do not place the artwork on another wall or in another perspective.
